claim: Barry Jennings died on August 19, 2008, at age 53. The only formal notification was a one-line announcement at his workplace; no public cause of death, autopsy, or death certificate has been released. Two days later, on August 21, 2008, NIST released its final report on the collapse of 7 World Trade Center (NCSTAR 1A), which did not include Jennings's lobby-explosion testimony among the witness accounts it cited.

sources.label: BanderasNews — “Key Witness to WTC 7 Explosions Dead at 53”
sources.quote: Barry Jennings, a key 9/11 eyewitness who was an emergency coordinator for the New York Housing Authority, has passed away at age 53 from circumstances not yet disclosed.

sources.label: NIST NCSTAR 1A — “Final Report on the Collapse of World Trade Center Building 7” (Aug 21, 2008)
The Corbett Report — “9/11 Whistleblowers: Barry Jennings”
Haley Press / @strategichaley, Instagram reel DVOtv6QCTFf (Feb 26, 2026) — surfacing source

notes: Documented: date of death (Aug 19 2008), absence of public death record, proximity (2 days) to NIST WTC 7 final report release. The reel narrates Jennings's death as a murder by 'heart attack pellet' — this is fictional within the artist's confessional frame, not in any documented record. The record here documents what IS public: the timing coincidence and the absence of a death certificate. NIST report URL pending (nist.gov canonical).
